JavaScript tests for property enumerability and non-enumerability using `Object.defineProperty`.


## Files
- **[15.02.04.07-001.js](15.02.04.07-001.js.md)**: Tests the non-enumerability of a non-existent property 'prop2' on an object.
- **[15.02.04.07-002.js](15.02.04.07-002.js.md)**: Tests if a property is enumerable using `Object.defineProperty` and `propertyIsEnumerable`.
- **[15.02.04.07-003.js](15.02.04.07-003.js.md)**: Tests the non-enumerability of a property defined with Object.defineProperty in JavaScript.
